code: import axios from'axios';const API=axios.create({baseURL:process.env.REACT_APP_API_URL||'http://localhost:5000/api'});API.interceptors.request.use(config=>{const user=JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('hungrybirds_user')||'{}');if(user!==null&&user!==void 0&&user.token){config.headers.Authorization=`Bearer ${user.token}`;}return config;});export default API;
